description: A visual separator between content sections, either horizontal or vertical. Use to establish a clear visual hierarchy in the UI. They should be subtle and not overpower the content they are meant to organize.
instructions: Use direction='vertical' for inline dividers between horizontal elements. Set decorative=true when the divider is purely visual and should be hidden from screen readers. Use as='li' when the divider appears inside a list. The padding prop controls spacing around the line, not the line thickness.
name: Divider
